subtitle: A curve of flour-fine gold sand backed by one of only a handful of native stone-pine forests in Greece, and a lagoon behind that the same name protects.

levers.photo_tone: pale gold sand, dark pine canopy, clear shallow turquoise, low morning light

spike_statement: The pines that name Koukounaries are stone pines, one of Greece's few native stands; beach, forest and lagoon share the name and the protection.
